hero.title: CATCH THE WIND
hero.sub: Türkiye's most established kiteboard school. 21 years of experience, 300 windy days a year, and the experience of being the first school in Kefaloz bay. Take your first step onto the water.

about.title: WE DEVOTED OUR LIVES TO WIND & WATER
about.body1: We left everything behind and founded Volkite Kiteboard School in cittaslow Gökçeada. With 21 years of kitesurf teaching experience, we are in Kefaloz bay.
about.body2: Our base is designed to meet every kiteboarder's needs within a few steps. We teach in English, Spanish, Arabic, French and Italian.

lessons.title: THE RIGHT PROGRAM FOR YOU
lessons.sub: With TYF-certified KB5/KB4 instructors — start from zero or level up. Equipment and radio included in every package.

levels.title: BEGINNER PROGRAM
levels.desc: From zero to independent kiteboarder with theory, safety and 5 modules. All equipment included.

levels.title: DISCOVERY & CONTINUE
levels.desc: Finish in one windy day. Start fresh or continue your unfinished training from where you left off.

levels.title: ADVANCED LEVEL
levels.desc: Freeride, freestyle and wave riding. A roadmap for your level, one-to-one over BB Talkin radio.

trust.title: WHY VOLKITE?
trust.sub: The safest way to learn — top equipment, the highest standards and constant communication.

items.title: Choice of champions
items.desc: Learn on the world's No.1, user-friendly kitesurf equipment.

items.title: High standards
items.desc: Our lessons follow Türkiye Sailing Federation standards.

items.title: One step ahead
items.desc: Helmet-radio for nonstop communication with your coach while riding.

items.name: Equipment Sales
items.desc: New & second-hand gear from Slingshot and select brands.

items.name: Equipment Rental
items.desc: Up-to-date kite, board and harness rental options.

items.name: Gear Storage
items.desc: Leave your gear safely and find it ready every visit.

items.name: Kite Repair
items.desc: Professional repair service for your kite and gear.

items.name: Kitesurf Safari
items.desc: Guided long-distance kite safari along the best routes.

items.name: Wakeboard
items.desc: A fun way to stay on the water even when there is no wind.

items.name: Massage Therapy
items.desc: Classic, sport and thai massage to recover after the water.

gallery.title: FRAMES FROM THE WATER
gallery.sub: Moments from lessons, the spot and the Volkite life.

items.name: Elif K.
items.text: I started from zero and was riding on my own after three days. The radio coaching changes everything.

items.name: Marco R.
items.text: The spot is incredibly safe and the team is very professional. I'll come back to Gökçeada just for this.

items.name: Ahmet Y.
items.text: Lessons, cafe and the view all in one. Holiday and sport together — a great time with the family.

stay.title: WHAT TO KNOW BEFORE YOU COME

items.title: How to reach the island
items.desc: Take the Kabatepe ferry from Çanakkale to Gökçeada, then ~20 min to Kefaloz bay. We help you plan your trip.

items.title: Where to stay
items.desc: Partner guesthouses and hotels, plus caravan & camping options. We suggest the best fit when you book.

items.title: When to come
items.desc: We are open April–November with ~300 windy days a year. The strongest wind is in summer.

kitchen.title: BEFORE & AFTER KITEBOARDING
kitchen.body: We serve world-cuisine flavours with a fresh, quality menu. We design custom menus for birthdays, barbecues and group parties.

items.q: I have no experience, can I learn?
items.a: Yes! The beginner program is made for absolute beginners. We progress step by step with safety and kite control, all equipment included.
The school is open April–November, with around 300 windy days a year.

items.q: Do I need to bring equipment?
items.a: No. Slingshot gear, harness and helmet-radio are included. You can also use your own equipment.

items.q: What if there is no wind?
items.a: On windless days the lesson is postponed to a later date; we keep your plan flexible. We also offer wakeboard as an alternative.

items.q: Which languages do you teach in?
items.a: We teach in Turkish, English, Spanish, Arabic, French and Italian.
We guide you to partner guesthouses, hotels and camping options. Get in touch and we'll suggest the best fit.

booking.title: THE WIND IS WAITING
booking.sub: Tell us your dates and we handle the rest. Fill the form or call directly — we reply the same day.
booking.soon: Online booking coming soon — for now, form & phone.
booking.thanksBody: We received your request and will get back to you shortly. Windy days ahead!

footer.tag: Türkiye's most established kiteboard school, in the wind paradise of Kefaloz bay, Gökçeada.

chat.title: Volkite Assistant
chat.soon: Our assistant is coming soon! For now, reach us by phone or WhatsApp.

meta.title: Volkite Kitesurf School | Gokceada
meta.description: Gokceada's most established kitesurf school. 21 years of experience, IKO certified instructors, professional training at Kefalos Bay.
